---
title: "Home"
description: "Landing page for the academic personal website."
lang: en
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {.hero-shell}
::: {.hero-grid}
::: {.hero-copy}
<p class="eyebrow">Academic Personal Website</p>

# Ad Soyad {#home-title}

<p class="hero-role">Academic title | Department / Institution</p>
<p class="hero-lede">
  This site is designed as a durable and accessible academic home for sharing
  research, publications, and scholarly updates. It presents core research
  areas, selected outputs, and contact channels in a clean and professional structure.
</p>

<ul class="hero-tags">
  <li>Research area 1</li>
  <li>Research area 2</li>
  <li>Interdisciplinary collaboration</li>
</ul>

::: {.hero-actions}
[<i class="bi bi-journal-text" aria-hidden="true"></i><span>View Publications</span>](publications.html){.button-link .button-link-icon}
[<i class="bi bi-people" aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Contact and Profiles</span>](contact.html){.button-link .button-link-secondary .button-link-icon}
:::
:::

::: {.hero-aside}
::: {.hero-note-card}
<div class="card-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-stars"></i></div>

<p class="card-title">Current Academic Focus</p>

Use this area as an editorial note for an ongoing project, a research theme,
or a book or article currently in progress.
:::

::: {.metric-grid}
::: {.metric-card}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-muted" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-binoculars"></i></div>

<p class="card-title">Research</p>

Open science, information architecture, digital scholarly communication
:::

::: {.metric-card}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-muted" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-collection"></i></div>

<p class="card-title">Publications</p>

Expandable catalogue for articles, conference papers, books, and theses
:::

::: {.metric-card}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-muted" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-easel2"></i></div>

<p class="card-title">Teaching</p>

Ready for future pages on courses, projects, and short academic notes
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section-stack}
::: {.section-surface}
::: {.section-heading}
<p class="section-kicker">Research Profile</p>

## Research Areas

<p class="section-lede">
  Presenting your core themes as distinct cards helps visitors understand
  expertise quickly and gives the site a stronger scholarly presence.
</p>
:::

::: {.topic-grid}
::: {.topic-card}
<div class="card-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></div>

### Area 1

For example: digital humanities, educational technology, language studies, or social theory.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
<div class="card-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-braces-asterisk"></i></div>

### Area 2

Summarize a method, theme, or subfield in a concise and professional way.
:::

::: {.topic-card}
<div class="card-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-intersect"></i></div>

### Area 3

Highlight interdisciplinary work and areas where collaboration can emerge.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section-surface}
::: {.section-heading}
<p class="section-kicker">Quick Access</p>

## Academic Content Areas

<p class="section-lede">
  The home page should act not just as a list of links, but as a professional
  welcome panel that directs visitors to the right content quickly.
</p>
:::

::: {.action-grid}
::: {.action-tile}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-accent" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-person-vcard"></i></div>

### Biography

Present your academic background, institutional affiliation, and research interests in a structured format.

[<span>Open bio page</span><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" aria-hidden="true"></i>](bio.html){.action-tile__link .icon-link}
:::

::: {.action-tile}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-accent" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-stack"></i></div>

### Publication Catalogue

Articles, books, conference papers, and theses are managed as data rather than hard-coded HTML.

[<span>Go to publications</span><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" aria-hidden="true"></i>](publications.html){.action-tile__link .icon-link}
:::

::: {.action-tile}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-accent" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-envelope-paper"></i></div>

### Contact and Profiles

Keep institutional email, ORCID, Scholar, and other profiles in one reliable contact layer.

[<span>Open contact details</span><i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short" aria-hidden="true"></i>](contact.html){.action-tile__link .icon-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section-surface}
::: {.section-heading}
<p class="section-kicker">Selected Work</p>

## Featured Publications

<p class="section-lede">
  This section is generated from the publication IDs listed in
  `data/featured-publications.json`, so your editorial selection remains separate
  from Zotero exports and stays easy to maintain.
</p>
:::

<div id="featured-publications" aria-live="polite"></div>
:::

::: {.section-surface}
::: {.section-heading}
<p class="section-kicker">Current Snapshot</p>

## Ongoing Work and Announcements

<p class="section-lede">
  Use this area for upcoming talks, works in progress, or short notes on current projects.
</p>
:::

::: {.info-grid}
::: {.info-card}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-muted" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i></div>

### Ongoing Research

Summarize current projects, fieldwork, grant-supported research, or a book manuscript in progress.
:::

::: {.info-card}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-muted" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-mic"></i></div>

### Upcoming Talks

A compact but visible area for seminars, panels, and conference presentations.
:::

::: {.info-card}
<div class="card-icon card-icon-muted" aria-hidden="true"><i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i></div>

### Future Expansion

Prepared space for projects, teaching, notes, or curated resource lists.
:::
:::
:::
:::

<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-articles.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-books.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-conferences.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-publication-source="true">
{{< include ../data/pub-theses.json >}}
</script>
<script type="application/json" data-featured-source="true">
{{< include ../data/featured-publications.json >}}
</script>
<script src="/assets/js/publications.js" defer></script>
